name: io.github.Battam1111/myco
title: Myco: Agent-First Cognitive Substrate
description: Agent-first cognitive substrate: 20 verbs + 46 lint dims over a self-validating graph.

io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/publish.stance_text: Myco is NOT a memory tool, NOT a RAG framework, NOT vector retrieval. It is a self-validating cognitive substrate for long-running LLM agents, governed by R1-R7 hard contract and 46 mechanical lint dimensions across 7 subsystems. All knowledge lives as plain markdown + YAML on disk; the agent reads files directly via MCP resources.
differentiators_against_alternatives: R1-R7 contract enforced by mechanical anchors
